name: forge-ecommerce-demo
description: Sample e-commerce project demonstrating Forge autonomous QE skill

scripts.dev:backend: concurrently "npm run dev:identity" "npm run dev:catalog" "npm run dev:payments" "npm run dev:orders"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: concurrently "cd backend/src/identity && npm run build" "cd backend/src/catalog && npm run build" "cd backend/src/payments && npm run build" "cd backend/src/orders && npm run build"
scripts.seed: npm run seed:identity && npm run seed:catalog && npm run seed:payments
scripts.migrate: concurrently "cd backend/src/identity && npx prisma migrate deploy" "cd backend/src/catalog && npx prisma migrate deploy" "cd backend/src/payments && npx prisma migrate deploy" "cd backend/src/orders && npx prisma migrate deploy"

author: Forge Skill Demo
